title: isodeca flaccida
side_effects: Isodeca flaccida can have side effects if used improperly, such as increased heart rate, dizziness, and nausea. Prolonged exposure to its toxic compounds can lead to more severe side effects, including liver damage and kidney failure. In extreme cases, consuming large quantities of the plant can cause seizures, respiratory distress, and even coma. Improper use of isodeca flaccida can also interact with other medications, exacerbating underlying health conditions.
